grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions EDD multiple times and treats Dubai funds as higher-risk requiring enhanced checks

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: Section 1 specifically covers FATF position assessment for UAE and general country risk factors

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Section 2 mandatorily requires SWIFT MT103/wire transfer confirmation with detailed specifications
Section 3 specifically covers AED to GBP conversion evidence requirements including FX contract notes

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: Section 9 comprehensively covers SAR/DAML reporting framework and obligations
